vars.style_prompt: Create an artistic style transformation of this image using the Pop Art style. Emphasize bold, vibrant colors and a comic book aesthetic. Use thick black outlines to define the features of the cat, with bright, contrasting colors such as electric blue, fiery red, and sunshine yellow filling the spaces in between. Add halftone dots to mimic the vintage comic printing technique. Highlight the cat's eyes with exaggerated sparkle effects, using white and light blue tones to make them pop. Apply flat, graphic shading to enhance the cartoonish appeal while maintaining a playful, contemporary vibe throughout the composition.
